info.name: CivicDesk - Complete API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for all 8 CivicDesk modules.

Base URL (API Gateway): http://localhost:9090
Context path: /civicDesk

All auth endpoints use the IAM service directly on port 8081.
All other requests go through the API Gateway on port 9090.

Flow order for full E2E test:
1. Admin Login → get ADMIN_TOKEN
2. Admin creates Supervisor (DS) → set password → login → SUPERVISOR_TOKEN
3. Supervisor creates Field Officer (FO) → set password → login → OFFICER_TOKEN
4. Register Citizen → Citizen Login → CITIZEN_TOKEN
5. Run module-specific flows

item.name: 1.4 Set Password (for staff created by Admin/DS)

exec: // Change variable name based on who is logging in

item.name: 3.1 Get All Services (Public - no auth needed)

body.raw:
{
  "serviceName": "Water Connection",
  "description": "New water connection for residential property",
  "category": "INFRASTRUCTURE",
  "processingDays": 7,
  "fee": 1500.00,
  "requiredDocuments": "PropertyTax,IDProof"
}

item.name: 4.2 Get All Permits (Citizen sees own / Staff sees all)

body.raw:
{

item.name: 6.1 Get Work Orders (Public - no auth, filter by ward)
